config.broadcastIntervalSeconds.name: Broadcast Interval
config.broadcastIntervalSeconds.tooltip: How often to broadcast server presence (in seconds). Lower values = faster discovery, higher network traffic.
config.gamePort.name: Game Port
config.gamePort.tooltip: The port your game server listens on. Default: 24642. Change this if you've customized your game's port.
config.broadcastPort.name: Broadcast Port
config.broadcastPort.tooltip: The UDP port to broadcast/listen on for LAN discovery. Default: 24644. Must match on all clients.
config.broadcastAcrossAllInterfaces.name: Broadcast Across All Adapters
config.broadcastAcrossAllInterfaces.tool: Enable to broadcast on all adapters. Disable to choose a specific adapter below.
config.networkAdapterName.name: Network Adapter
config.networkAdapterName.tooltip: Select which adapter to use for broadcasting (only used when 'Broadcast Across All' is disabled).
config.enableLanScanning.name: Enable LAN Server Discovery
config.enableLanScanning.tooltip: When enabled, automatically discover and display LAN servers in the Co-op menu. Disable if you only want to manually enter IP addresses.
